description: Pinned deterministic-provider retrieval averages on the self-corpus fixture (benchmarks/dataset.json) at retrieval depth 200. Used ONLY as a non-regression reference for the CI blocking gate — NOT a publishable superiority claim (the self-corpus is the pre-decontamination easy fixture; publishable numbers are commit-derived in COMMIT-DERIVED-FINDINGS.md). Deterministic hash embeddings => these numbers are exact and reproducible, so the non-regression guard is non-flaky.
